title: Hardcore Plus
description: This datapack will change some mechanics to complicate the game.
body:
---

**This datapack changes some of the mechanics of the game in order to complicate it.
If you want to complicate the game, then go ahead and download this datapack.**

---
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b5j533CT/images/1acc121e13471191b67b6514226b6b12abc71a85.png)
---
**You can't sleep on beds.**

**You get water damage.**
(Exception: If you have a water_breathing or conduit_power effect, then you will not receive water damage)

**You have 10 rebirths each new rebirth takes away from you one heart that can be restored with a golden enchanted apple (If the player has already lost all his lives, then you can build a constitution and throw a totem into it, then the player must fly up to this structure and revive it with 1 life).**
(you can also eat golden enchanted apples until you have 50 hp or 25 hearts)
<details>
<summary>The Pedestal of Rebirth</summary>

# After creating the pedestal, you need to throw the totem of undying.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b5j533CT/images/8459de8de54af7045099c6e6e096500201c9e138.png)

</details>

**If you burn, you will receive additional damage.**

**You can craft a golden enchanted apple.**

<details>
<summary>Craft</summary>

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/b5j533CT/images/bc9d27fe6acbf0bf782070dae81dc44fe9accf9f.png)

</details>


**The mine may collapse.**

**You will not be able to craft items until you open them in the knowledge book.**

**You cannot use fireworks when flying elitras.**

**Some information is disabled in F3.**
(for example: coordinates, biome, light, direction, etc.)

<details>
<summary> Items </summary>

### You can see some of this information with these items:

| Item | Display |
|-|-|
| Compass| Coordinates |

</details>

**Mobs**

<details>
<summary>Mob Attributes</summary>

| MOB             | Damage               | Speed             | Follow range               | Other              |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|---------------------:|---------------------:|---------------------:|
| Zombie | 4.5 | 0.3 | 50 | -  |
| Zombie village | 4.5 | 0.3 | 50 | -  |
| Drowned zombie | 4.5 | 0.3 | 50 | -  |
| Husk | 4.5 | 0.3 | 50 | -  |
| Spider | 3.5 | 0.4 | 50 | - |
| Creeper | - | 0.29 | 25| Explosion speed: 25 |
| Skeleton | - | 0.29 | 25 | Item: Bow{Power:3} |
| Stray | - | 0.29 | 20 | Item: Bow{Power:3} |
| Wither skeleton | - | 0.3 | 20 | Item: Stone_sword{Sharpness:1} |
| Pillager | - | - | - | Item: Crossbow{Quick_charge:3} |
| Enderman | 9 | 0.35 | 45 | - |

</details>

---
